webservice.description: Syncs a QA run result from the Inspector to the cloud evidence vault — stores qa_score, belt, run_id, and evidence_hash
webservice.auth: Bearer token required — returns 401 if missing or invalid

inputs.evidence_hash: string (required) — SHA-256 hash of evidence bundle

guarantees: Returns 401 if Authorization header is missing
Returns 401 if Bearer token is invalid or expired
Returns 422 if any required field (project, qa_score, belt, run_id, evidence_hash) is missing
Stores evidence_hash on successful sync (tamper-evident append-only log)
Idempotent: re-syncing same run_id does not create duplicate
owasp_guarantees: No token → 401 (not 200 with silent write failure)

frontend_dependencies: Inspector --sync flag calls this endpoint after each QA run
evidence_notes: GLOW 94 deliverable: Inspector sync endpoint. Michael Bolton: evidence without a chain of custody is hearsay. evidence_hash makes every synced result tamper-evident. Auth required — only the Inspector agent can write.
